_instructions: Copy this file to shared/receipt_shared/resources/category_guidance.json and customize values for your budget.
Do not commit category_guidance.json (it may contain personal categories/payees/intent rules).
Keep the same top-level keys and value types.
edge_case_rules: Explain tricky distinctions that require user intent.
Use explicit receipt evidence before assigning exceptional categories.
model_behavior_rules: If transaction date is unclear, set transaction_date to null.
If payee is uncertain, set payee_name to an empty string.
Prefer blank over hallucinated values for uncertain fields.

ambiguity_reporting.instruction: Include category_ambiguity_flags entries when confidence threshold is met.
